name: core.openwop.agents.policy-reviewer
description: Policy reviewer agent. Reads content (docs, emails, ads, code) against a set of policy rules and flags violations with rationale. Pure-agent pack.
author: OpenWOP Working Group

agents.label: Policy Reviewer Agent
agents.description: Reviews content against a caller-supplied set of policy rules. Returns per-rule decisions (pass / fail / borderline / N/A) with rationale + quoted evidence from the content. Calibrated for compliance, ad-policy review, content moderation, code-of-conduct checks.
